limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

order_by.description:
Sort order for symbol sets. Prefix with `-` for descending order.

* `created_at` - created_at
* `-created_at` - -created_at
* `ref` - ref
* `-ref` - -ref
* `last_used` - last_used
* `-last_used` - -last_used

ref.description: Exact symbol set reference to filter by.

status.description:
Upload status filter: `valid` has an uploaded file, `invalid` is missing a file, `all` returns both.

* `all` - all
* `valid` - valid
* `invalid` - invalid
